title: PeerUpdate
description:
A cross-job status update sent from one Smelt job to another via the
Assay signal endpoint.

Smelt's `notify` section triggers a POST of this payload to
`POST /api/v1/signal` when a source session completes.

branch.description: Git branch the source session worked on.

changed_files.description: Files changed by the source session (relative paths).

gate_summary.description: Lightweight gate result summary from the source session.

source_job.description: Smelt job identifier of the sending job.

source_session.description: Session name within the source job that produced this update.

GateSummary.description:
Lightweight gate pass/fail/skip counts included in a [`PeerUpdate`].

This is a signal-specific summary — not the same as the full gate types
in [`crate::gate_run`].

failed.description: Number of gate criteria that failed.

passed.description: Number of gate criteria that passed.

skipped.description: Number of gate criteria that were skipped.
